docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-22-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KIRA FRANK FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-02-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-18-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK, KIRA AS TO DEFENDANT CEREGHINO, NICHOLAS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-22-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF KIRA FRANK FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-10-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM. ALL PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF ARE VACATED. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: FRANK, KIRA 232 21ST AVE #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
